name: tenexity-setup-team-hvac-plumbing
description: Multi-user setup plugin for HVAC and plumbing wholesale distributors deploying CoWork for Distributors across a team of 5-50 employees. Bundles four skills: Setup Company (GM/admin runs once, ~15 min), Setup User (every employee runs, ~5 min), System Review (monthly cadence), and First Week Guide (5 days of guided wins). Designed for staged rollout — connect once, install once per machine, scale from 5 to 50 users without reconfiguration.
